{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that the primal-dual system (16.58) can be solved either by the augmented system\n\\[\n\\begin{bmatrix}\nG & -A^T \\\\\nA & \\Lambda^{-1}Y\n\\end{bmatrix}\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n\\Delta x \\\\\n\\Delta \\lambda\n\\end{bmatrix}\n=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n-r_d \\\\\n-r_p + (-y + \\sigma\\mu\\Lambda^{-1}e)\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\tag{16.61}\n\\]\nor by the normal equations\n\\[\n(G + A^T Y^{-1}\\Lambda A)\\Delta x\n=\n-r_d + A^T Y^{-1}\\Lambda[-r_p - y + \\sigma\\mu\\Lambda^{-1}e].\n\\tag{16.62}\n\\]\nDescribe in detail how each component of the step, \\((\\Delta x, \\Delta y, \\Delta \\lambda)\\), is computed from these formulations."}
